system.description:
These devices, also known as sense-links, allow the owner to directly interface with a machine or technological device. MIUs see widespread use among Techmarines.

Exceptional models include advanced spinal/cortex connectors, wrist connector probes, and possibly mechadendrite connectors for enhanced machine communion.

Game Effects: Grants a +10 bonus to communicate with machine spirits. When interfaced with MIU systems, grants a +10 bonus to Tech-Use, Pilot, Drive, Logic, Inquiry, and Ballistic Skill Tests.

Note: Bonuses only apply when directly interfaced with MIU-capable devices/systems. Machine spirit communication bonus applies during communion rituals and interactions with machine spirits.
